title: arum elongatum subsp. detruncatum
intro: Arum elongatum subsp. detruncatum, also known as the Arum lily, is a plant species belonging to the Arum genus, characterized by its striking white and green inflorescence. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arum elongatum subsp. detruncatum include reducing fever, treating snake bites, and providing relief from rheumatic and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
